phone.note: Update the number in ALL files listed below. Also update href='tel:...' attributes.

email.note: Update both display text and mailto: href.

address.currentValue: Unit 220, 10151 No. 3 Rd, Richmond, BC V7A 4R6

hours.note: Update hours table in contact/index.html and footer hours lists in all pages.

editableFields.heroSubtitle: High-quality dental care for your whole family — built on oral health education, preventative care, and a non-invasive approach whenever possible.
editableFields.heroCaption3: Implants & Orthodontics to restore your smile
editableFields.welcomeHeading: Dental care for the whole family
editableFields.welcomePara1: Aurora Dental Clinic is dedicated to providing the highest quality of dental services for your whole family. Our dentists advocate a non-invasive approach whenever possible.
editableFields.welcomePara2: We believe that through oral health education and preventative care, we can help our patients achieve optimal health. Our clinic is like one big family; we have been serving the Richmond community for over 35 years and have watched families grow up in our care. We look forward to meeting you!
editableFields.ctaBandHeading: Ready to meet your Richmond dental family?
editableFields.ctaBandText: Book an appointment today, or call our front desk and we'll be happy to help you get started.

staff/index.html.description: Meet the Team page — dentists and hygienists

editableFields.lucyBio: Multi-paragraph bio starting with 'Dr. Lucy (Zhenzi) Liu holds both dentist...'
editableFields.jamesBio: Multi-paragraph bio starting with 'Dr. James Hsia has practiced general dentistry since 1981...'
editableFields.kylaBio: Kyla received her Dental Hygiene Diploma at Vancouver Community College...
editableFields.avneetBio: Avneet graduated with a diploma in Sport Science in 2018 from Douglas College...

staff/index.html.note: For photo changes: upload new image to assets/images/, then update the src attribute in the HTML.

faq/index.html.description: FAQ page — 10 questions in accordion format (<details>/<summary>)
faq/index.html.note: Each FAQ item is a <details class='faq-item'> block. Clients can edit questions/answers, add new ones, or remove existing ones.

editableFields.faq2Q: What do I bring to my first visit?
editableFields.faq3Q: Where do I find the new patient form?
editableFields.faq5Q: Does the clinic offer dental surgery on site?

editableFields.faq8Q: How much will my visit cost?
editableFields.faq9Q: How do I find your office?
editableFields.faq10Q: What is a dental treatment plan?

services/index.html.note: Each service is a <div class='svc'> block with an h2 and paragraphs. Clients can update service descriptions.

contact/index.html.description: Contact page — info card, hours table, booking form

editableFields.pageIntro: Dr. Liu and her team are passionate about community dentistry...
editableFields.findingUsNote: We're in the Richlea Square complex above Tisol Pet Foods...

n8nInstructions.onRequest: Read this file first to understand which HTML files to fetch. For sitewide fields (phone/email/address/hours), fetch ALL files listed in appearsIn. For page-specific fields, fetch only that page's file.
n8nInstructions.onImageUpload: Commit the uploaded image to assets/images/{filename}. Then update the src attribute in the relevant HTML file. Also update the alt text if the user provides a description.
n8nInstructions.afterEdit: Update the currentValue in this file to reflect the new content, then commit all changed files in a single commit.
